Video.summary: An extensive and informative dive behind-the-scenes on the House Robots. Get inside information from designer Chris Reynolds, on what goes into creating these killing machines.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: House Robots

Video.summary: Follow Team Chaos's journey. From humble beginnings to how they ended up building one of the most feared Robots ever to compete.
Video.title: Ultimate Collection: Chaos 2

Video.summary: Competitors are once again tasked with defending their land in King of the Castle, will they defend their reign or be overthrown by the house robots? An even match in the semi-finals causes the house robots to forcefully decide a winner.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: Dead Metal takes to the ring to stop any competitors from progressing to the stage of the competition.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: First of the two Semi-Finals to determine which two of the six heat winners will progress to The Second Wars Grand Finals. The house robots are showing no mercy in the gauntlet and the competitors test their accuracy in this week’s trial, Pinball.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 1

Video.summary: The last Semi-Final, competitors will once again battle the house robots in Pinball, evade them in the gauntlet and use them to destroy other competitors in the arena.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Semi Final 2

Video.summary: The wars begin yet again, competitors can only qualify by destroying or outsmarting their opponents, and doing their best to stay out of the house robots way. Sumo and Pinball Warrior will test the robots grit and accuracy.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat A

Video.summary: Six competitors, including World Champion Razer battle it out for a shot at the Fourth Wars title. Irreparable damage could mean the permanent end of one of the veteran competitors in the semi-finals.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat B

Video.summary: A competitor faces issues before the battle even begins in this week’s eliminators and the house robots stand by, ready to strike the final blow. The clock proves to be the enemy in this week’s Pinball Warrior, and the competitors prepare to stand their ground in Sumo Bash.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat C

Video.summary: Veterans and Newcomers once again face the eliminators and Dead Metal tries to make a friend. A house robot gets flipped, causing the others to go on a rampage. A uniquely designed robot takes on Pinball Warrior and two more competitors stare down Shunt in Sumo Bash.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat D

Video.summary: A single strike spells trouble for a robot in the eliminators. A fleeting alliance forms as competitor and house robot team up to make an offering to the pit. This week’s Pinball Warrior has high-hopes for a standout performance.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat E

Video.summary: A robot with a unique strategy takes part in this week’s heat. Is it a recipe for success, or a fancy gimmick? The house robot’s manners are at an all-time low as they continue to attack after cease is called.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat F

Video.summary: The robots take the term “facing off” literally this week as they rip each other apart. Will Shunt manage to shake off the competitors in this week’s Sumo Bash.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat G

Video.summary: The heat descends into chaos as the house robots team up to take down the competitors. The judges make a controversial decision in the final to decide this week’s winner.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat H

Video.summary: Over halfway through the heats and the hopefuls are still lining up to put their robots through mechanical hell, for a chance of making it to the semi-finals.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat I

Video.summary: An apparent malfunction gives a veteran competitor an opportunity to redeem themselves in the eliminators. The World Champion returns to take on the Pinball Warrior.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat J

Video.summary: Sparks fly in this week’s heat as competitors put their weapons to good use and a robot uses its shape to their advantage.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat K

Video.summary: The eliminator begins slowly, but as the battle heats up the robots must stay cool, or they might end up losing their head. The house robots see one of their busiest nights in the arena as they try to keep up.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat L

Video.summary: Celebrities take to the arena, teaming up with veterans from the series and their robots. The celebrities must control the robots for at least 60 seconds before the professionals can take over.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars
The Fourth Wars - Celebrity Robot Wars

Video.summary: Four teams take part in the tag team terror tournament. Two teams comprised of two robots enter the arena at once. Only one robot is allowed to battle, only being able to switch with their team-mate by entering their team’s coloured zone.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror
The Fourth Wars - Tag Team Terror

Video.summary: The UK and USA battle it out to prove which country has the better robots. Each country has four robots representing and fighting for them. A straight knockout competition will determine a victor.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - War of Independence

Image.alt: The Fourth Wars - War of Independence
The Fourth Wars - War of Independence
The Fourth Wars - War of Independence

Video.summary: The heats resume this week, and one competitor has its own entrance ceremony. Gemini returns to the arena to prove themselves in Pinball Warrior.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat M

Video.summary: Renowned robot Firestorm 2 takes on Pinball Warrior this week and the heats are nearing their end. The house robots show no mercy against a flipped robot.
Video.title: The Fourth Wars - Heat N

Video.summary: The Grand Final arrives, only the best robots have made it this far. The four remaining robots face two eliminators and a playoff. The two winners then face each other to determine who will be named champion of Robot Wars: The Second wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grand Final

Video.summary: The Grudge Matches gave competitors an opportunity to come back and settle some scores. A one-off episode featuring a variety of battles; Judgement Day, Reserve Rumble, Inferno Insurrection, Ramrombit, Super Showdown and Internet Insurrection.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Grudge Matches

Video.summary: Take a look back at the phenomenal second series, relive the highs and lows of the house robots and competitors of The Second Wars.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Best Of

Video.summary: An insightful view into how Robot Wars Series 1 was created.
Video.title: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars

Image.alt: The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
The Second Wars - Making of Robot Wars
